attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY                                                                                                                 SALES_ORDER_KEY,
SSO.BK_COMPANY_CODE                                                                                                            BK_COMPANY_CODE,
SSO.BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY                                                                                      BK_SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
SSO.BK_SO_NUMBER_INT                                                                                                            BK_SO_NUMBER_INT,
CAST(SCOOHA.CREATION_DATE               AS TIMESTAMP(0)    ) START_TV_DATETIME,
CAST(CAST(SCOOHA.CREATION_DATE AS DATE FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YYYY') AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')                START_SSP_DATE,
CAST ('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)   )               END_TV_DATETIME,
CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE FORMAT 'YYYY-MM-DD')        END_SSP_DATE,
SCOOHA.SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE                                                                     SHIPMENT_PRIORITY_CODE, 
SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE10                                                                                                                  PURCHASE_ORDER_TYPE_CODE,
SCOOHA.CUST_PO_NUMBER                                                                                                      PURCHASE_ORDER_NUMBER,
CAST(SCOOHA.ORDERED_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0))                          ORDER_DATETIME,
CAST(SCOOHA.BOOKED_DATE AS            TIMESTAMP(0)   )             ORACLE_BOOK_DATETIME,
SCOOHA.TRANSACTIONAL_CURR_CODE                                                                               TRANSACTIONAL_CURRENCY_CODE,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS INVOICING_DEFERRAL_EXPIR_DTM,
'N' EARLY_SHIP_ALLOWED_FLAG ,     /* Need Clarity */ 
COALESCE (SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE17,'=') PARTIAL_SHIPMENT_ALLOWED_FLAG,
COALESCE (SCOOHA.OPEN_FLAG,'=')                                                      SALES_ORDER_OPEN_FLAG,
'UNKNOWN' AS CUSTOMER_SERVICE_REP_NAME ,  /*derived based on CSRM tables*/
NULL AS PURCHASE_ORDER_DATE,  /*loaded frm header_ext*/
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS FAX_RECEIVED_DATETIME,  /*loaded frm header_ext*/
CASE WHEN SCOOHA.FLOW_STATUS_CODE  IN ('CLOSED','CANCELED' ) THEN  SCOOHA.FLOW_STATUS_CODE
ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END                  COMPLETE_ORDER_RESULT_CODE,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS SALES_ORDER_EXPIRATION_DTM,  /*loaded frm header_ext*/
'UNKNOWN' AS CUST_SVC_REP_TEAM_NAME, /*derived based on CSRM tables*/
SCOOHA.CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE                                                                                        CONVERSION_TYPE_CODE,
                                CASE      
                WHEN   
                                SCOOHA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID=2 THEN SCOOHA.SOURCE_DOCUMENT_ID 
                                                ELSE       SCOOHA.ORIG_SYS_DOCUMENT_REF
                                END                       ORIGINAL_SYSTEM_REFERENCE_CODE,
NULL AS SUBMITTED_ON_WEB_BY_NAME, /*loaded frm header_ext*/
CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS RU_CISCO_BOOKED_DATETIME, /*loaded frm header_ext*/
NCIO.BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE                                                            BK_INV_ORG_NAME_CODE , 
SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE18                                                                                                                  BK_DEAL_ID,
NPL.BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME                                                                                                          BK_PRICE_LIST_NAME,
ESOS.NAME                                                                                                                                                        BK_SO_SOURCE_NAME, 

CASE 
WHEN NSOT.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG IS NULL THEN ESOT.NAME 
WHEN NSOT.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG = 'Y' THEN NSOT.BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME
WHEN NSOT.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG = 'N' THEN ESOT.NAME 
END BK_ORDER_TYPE_NAME, /* Changed as part of CE AUS Q3FY14 */


SCOOHA.FOB_POINT_CODE                                                                                                        BK_FOB_POINT_CODE,
SCOOHA.FREIGHT_CARRIER_CODE                                                                           BK_FREIGHT_TERMS_CODE,
CAST(SCOOHA.CREATION_DATE               AS TIMESTAMP(0)  )        BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME,
CAST(SCOOHA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE AS TIMESTAMP(0)  ) BK_SO_SRC_UPD_DATETIME,
SCOOHA.SALES_CHANNEL_CODE                                                                                             BK_SALES_CHANNEL_CODE,
'ERP'                                                                                                                                                      BK_SALES_CHANNEL_SOURCE_TYPE,
SCOOHA.ORDER_CATEGORY_CODE                                                                                         SALES_ORDER_CATEGORY_TYPE,
SCOOHA.HEADER_ID                                                                                                                      SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE                                                                                    SS_CODE,
COALESCE(SCOOHA.CANCELLED_FLAG,'=')                                                                                           CANCELLED_FLAG,
SCOOHA.PRICING_DATE                                                                                               PRICING_DATETIME,
NECAL_SHIP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY                         SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
NECAL_BILL.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY                           BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
NCAT_SOLD.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY                                                               SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
COALESCE (SSO_ORIG.SALES_ORDER_KEY, -9999)                              RU_BK_ORIG_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER,
USER EDW_UPDATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME,
COALESCE(SCOOHA.FLOW_STATUS_CODE ,'=')          ORDER_CYCLE_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(EFU_CR.USER_NAME  ,'UNKNOWN')          SO_CREATED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
COALESCE(EFU_UPD.USER_NAME  ,'UNKNOWN')         SO_MODIFIED_BY_ERP_USER_NAME,
'N' CUSTOMER_ACCEPTANCE_FLG,
CASE 
WHEN NSOT.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG IS NULL THEN COALESCE(SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE11 ,'UNKNOWN')
WHEN NSOT.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG = 'Y' THEN NSOT. SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME
WHEN NSOT.ORIGINATED_QTC_VIA_CG1_FLG = 'N' THEN COALESCE(SCOOHA.ATTRIBUTE11 ,'UNKNOWN')
END SALES_ORDER_PROGRAM_TYPE_NAME, /* Changed as part of CE AUS Q3FY14 */
'I' ACTION_CODE,
'I' DML_TYPE
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_OE_ORDER_HEADERS_ALL SCOOHA  
INNER JOIN 
(
$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO
INNER JOIN 
$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SO
ON
(NSSC_SO.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSO.SS_CODE)
)
ON         
(SCOOHA.HEADER_ID=SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT  AND       NSSC_SO.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
/* INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO 
ON (SCOOHA.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID=NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT) */
INNER JOIN (SELECT BK_INVENTORY_ORG_NAME_CODE,SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT,SS_CODE FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT ORDER BY SS_CODE ASC)=1 )NCIO
ON (SCOOHA.SHIP_FROM_ORG_ID=NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT)

LEFT OUTER JOIN    
$$COMREFVWDB.N_PRICE_LIST NPL 
ON(SCOOHA.PRICE_LIST_ID= NPL.SK_PRICE_LIST_ID_INT)
INNER JOIN   
$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
ON
(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
INNER JOIN  
$$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_SOURCES ESOS
ON
(SCOOHA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID=ESOS.SK_ORDER_SOURCE_ID AND             ESOS.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
INNER JOIN 
$$ETLVWDB.EL_SALES_ORDER_TYPES ESOT
ON
(SCOOHA.ORDER_TYPE_ID=ESOT.SK_ORDER_TYPE_ID AND          ESOT.GLOBAL_NAME='CG')
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
(
$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO_ORIG
INNER JOIN 
$$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_ORIG
ON
(NSSC_ORIG.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSO_ORIG.SS_CODE)
)
ON
(CAST(CASE WHEN          SCOOHA.ORDER_SOURCE_ID=2 THEN SCOOHA.SOURCE_DOCUMENT_ID  
ELSE       NULL      END       AS INTEGER) = SSO_ORIG.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT
AND       NSSC_ORIG.GLOBAL_NAME='CG' )
INNER JOIN 
$$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_SHIP
ON
(SCOOHA.SHIP_TO_ORG_ID=NECAL_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT)                
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_BILL
ON         
(SCOOHA.INVOICE_TO_ORG_ID=NECAL_BILL.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT)         
INNER JOIN 
$$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT  NCAT_SOLD
ON 
(SCOOHA.SOLD_TO_ORG_ID=NCAT_SOLD.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT    )        
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
(
SELECT
CASE WHEN NEU.ERP_USER_NAME  IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE 
EFU_CR.USER_NAME END USER_NAME
, EFU_CR.GLOBAL_NAME GLOBAL_NAME, EFU_CR.USER_ID USER_ID 
FROM 
                                $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_USER EFU_CR
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER                  NEU
                                ON
                                                NEU.ERP_USER_NAME = EFU_CR.USER_NAME
) EFU_CR
ON
EFU_CR.USER_ID = SCOOHA.CREATED_BY
AND
EFU_CR.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'                 
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
(
SEL 
CASE WHEN NEU.ERP_USER_NAME  IS NULL THEN 'UNKNOWN' ELSE 
EFU_UPD.USER_NAME END USER_NAME, 
EFU_UPD.GLOBAL_NAME GLOBAL_NAME , EFU_UPD.USER_ID USER_ID FROM 
                                $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_USER EFU_UPD
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
                $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER                  NEU
                                ON
                                                NEU.ERP_USER_NAME = EFU_UPD.USER_NAME
) EFU_UPD
ON
EFU_UPD.USER_ID = SCOOHA.LAST_UPDATED_BY
AND
EFU_UPD.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'  
LEFT JOIN
$$STGDB.WI_N_SALES_ORDER_TV_DAC NSOT          
ON
NSOT.SALES_ORDER_KEY = SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY     
QUALIFY               ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY SCOOHA.HEADER_ID ORDER BY SCOOHA.CREATION_DATE DESC) = 1
